journal.rationale: GOOGL's strong fundamentals (35% ROE, discounted P/E, near-zero debt) and bullish MACD crossover support entry, but the 17.5% run in 10 sessions with declining volume and DOJ antitrust overhang justify the risk team's reduction to 4%. At ~$321/share, a 4% allocation of the $10,000 portfolio yields ~$400, which rounds to 1 share. The 8% stop-loss at ~$295 accommodates elevated ATR while protecting against trend reversal; ideally entry would be on a pullback toward $315 but placing the order now with the stop in place is acceptable.
